Acolyte Iconward.name: Acolyte Iconward
Acolyte Iconward.equipped_with: An Acolyte Iconward is equipped with: -.

option_groups.header: Only one Acolyte Iconward per army.

abilities: Ambush, Command Squad, Infiltrator, Use cover
Nexus of Devotion: During each Reinforcement phase, 1D3 slain models return to the attached unit.
Ringleader: You may select up to two units with this ability for a single HQ slot. Each unit may only be taken once.

Sacred Cult Banner: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Leadership and Combat resolutions. As long as the banner bearer is alive, Mission objectives that are held by this unit can not be contested by enemy units. Additionally, all models in the unot gain +1 Attack.
Unquestioning Loyalty: This model may join any Genestealer Cults creature unit (regardless of their unit type). Additionally, that unit gains the "Bodyguard" ability.

abilities: Ambush, Infiltrator, Use cover
Psyker: The model can cast 2 powers and deny 2 powers per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.
Ringleader: You may select up to two units with this ability for a single HQ slot. Each unit may only be taken once.
Unquestioning Loyalty: This model may join any Genestealer Cults creature unit (regardless of their unit type). Additionally, that unit gains the "Bodyguard" ability.

Preternatural senses: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Psyker: The model can cast 2 powers and deny 2 powers per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.

Abominant.name: Abominant

option_groups.header: For every 500 points of game size, one Abominant may be included in the army that does not take up an Elite slot.

abilities: Ambush, Berserk, Infiltrator, Massive(1), Regeneration(1), Use cover
Mindwyrm familiar: The model can re-roll 1 to hit and 1 to wound roll.
The Chosen One: All melee weapons of the Abominant and its attached unit gain the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability.
Unquestioning Loyalty: This model may join any Genestealer Cults creature unit (regardless of their unit type). Additionally, that unit gains the "Bodyguard" ability.

Biophagus.name: Biophagus
Biophagus.equipped_with: A Biophagus is equipped with: Chemical vials; Injector goad.

option_groups.header: For every 500 points of game size, one Biophagus may be included in the army that does not take up an Elite slot.

abilities: Ambush, Command Squad, Infiltrator, Use cover
Alchemicus familiar: Can be used once per battle to grant "Poison(2+)" for all melee weapons of an attached unit until the end of the current battle round.

Genomic enhancement: Once per activation, the model can boost a friendly creature unit within 3" range.
1 - The unit gains +1 Strength. 
2 - The unit gains +1 Toughness. 
3 - The unit gets +1 BS and +1 WS. 
Character models cannot be upgraded. Each unit can only be upgraded once per game.
Unquestioning Loyalty: This model may join any Genestealer Cults creature unit (regardless of their unit type). Additionally, that unit gains the "Bodyguard" ability.

Clamavus.name: Clamavus
Clamavus.equipped_with: A Clamavus is equipped with: Autopistol.

option_groups.header: For every 500 points of game size, one Clamavus may be included in the army that does not take up an Elite slot.

abilities: Ambush, Command Squad, Infiltrator, Use cover
Proclamation Hailer: Friendly units within 12" automatically pass Leadership tests during the Rally phase.

Scrambler array: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.
Unquestioning Loyalty: This model may join any Genestealer Cults creature unit (regardless of their unit type). Additionally, that unit gains the "Bodyguard" ability.
Voice of New Truths: Enemy units within 12" suffer a -1 penalty to their Leadership value.

Nexos.name: Nexos
Nexos.equipped_with: A Nexos is equipped with: Autopistol.

option_groups.header: For every 500 points of game size, one Nexos may be included in the army that does not take up an Elite slot.

abilities: Ambush, Command Squad, Infiltrator, Use cover
Battlefield Analysis: Select one enemy unit on the table during each Reinforcement phase. You may re-roll a single hit, wound or armor penetration roll against the target.
Strategic Coordination: You may re-roll one reserve roll each Reinforcement phase.
Unquestioning Loyalty: This model may join any Genestealer Cults creature unit (regardless of their unit type). Additionally, that unit gains the "Bodyguard" ability.

Reductus Saboteur.name: Reductus Saboteur
Reductus Saboteur.equipped_with: A Reductus Saboteur is equipped with: Autopistol; Remote explosives.

option_groups.header: For every 500 points of game size, one Reductus Saboteur may be included in the army that does not take up an Elite slot.
May be equipped with

abilities: Ambush, Command Squad, Infiltrator, Use cover

Hidden explosives: Instead of using it like a ranged weapon, the model may set up any Demolition charge it posseses hidden on the table. Place three markers for each Demolition charge face down anywhere on the table that is outside of the enemy deployment zone. Two of these three markers are duds and don't do anything when revealed, while the actual marker causes one automatic hit with the profile of a Demolition charge. Markers are revealed the first time an enemy unit moves within 3" of the marker during its activation.
Unquestioning Loyalty: This model may join any Genestealer Cults creature unit (regardless of their unit type). Additionally, that unit gains the "Bodyguard" ability.

equipment.name: Alchemicus familiar
equipment.desc: The model's Genomic enhancement range is increased to 12".

equipment.name: Amulet of the Voidwyrm
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. Unique.

equipment.name: Atalan bike
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, Atalan small arms and the "Bike" type. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Cranial inlay
equipment.desc: The army adds +1 to rolls during the Reinforcement phase. Unique.

equipment.name: Crown of Ascendancy
equipment.desc: The model can manifest and deny 1 psychic power per turn. It knows Smite and all powers from the Broodmind discipline. Unique.

equipment.name: Cult relic
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Elixir of Dark Vistas
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Leadership.

equipment.name: Familiar
equipment.desc: The model may sacrifice the Familiar to reroll a psychic power manifestation test. While it is alive, the model gains +1 Initiative. Only for psykers.

equipment.name: Instinctive counter-strike
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Counter-Attack" ability.

equipment.name: Lash whip
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one (additional) hit roll per activation in melee.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Pennant of Ascension
equipment.desc: The unit gains an additional bonus of +1 to the combat result, as well as +1 attack per model. Only for models with a Cult icon. Unique.

equipment.name: Pervasion veil
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement and the "Jump pack" rule. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Preternatural senses
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Shadow stalker
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" abilities.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Synaptic weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll all to hit and to wound rolls in melee. Unique.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Unwilling Orb
equipment.desc: The model can deny 1 additional psychic power per turn and may deny psychic powers from any range.

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Flare launcher
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflect" ability.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Spotter
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" range with all ranged weapons.

equipment.name: Survey augur
equipment.desc: The model ignores the -1 to hit modifier for cover.

archetypes.name: The First Curse
archetypes.desc:
- Purestrain Genestealers units can be taken as Troops.
- The army must take one Patriarch.
- Only Purestrain Genestealers units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Outlander Claw
archetypes.desc:
- Atalan Jackals can be taken as Troops.
- Outflanking units may be deployed on turn 1.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

legacies.name: Legacy of Chancer's Vale
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Last Gasp" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of Feinminster Gamma
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Broodvolt Surge" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of New Gidlam
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Synaptic Blast" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of Newseam
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Inescapable Decay" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Trysst Dynasty
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Undermine" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of Vejovium III
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Mutagenic Deviation" psychic power in addition.

traits.name: Agile Guerillas
traits.desc: The model may shoot "Heavy" weapons with a -1 penalty and "Rapid Fire" weapons at full range with a "Move & Shoot" command

traits.name: Alien Fury
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Cyborgised Hybrids
traits.desc: Creature models gain a 6+ invulnerability save. Only for creature models that do not already have an invulnerability save from their datasheet or Armory.

traits.name: Deep Supplies
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: Devoted Zealots
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Blind Rage" ability.

traits.name: Hunter's Instincts
traits.desc: The unit gains a cumulative +1 bonus to armor save rolls while benefitting from cover.

traits.name: Martial
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll ranged to hit rolls of 1 with Assault, Pistol and Rapid Fire weapons.

traits.name: Nomadic Survivalists
traits.desc: The unit gains the the "Frenzy(1)" and "Haste(1) abilities.

traits.name: Splinter Cult
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Subterranean Ambushers
traits.desc: You may set up one additional "Ambush Marker" in Skirmishes, two additional markers in Pitched Battles, and three additional markers in Epic Battles.

traits.name: Synaptic Resonance
traits.desc: The model can re-roll one psychic test per activation. Psykers only.

traits.name: Toxin Agents
traits.desc: The unit's melee attacks gain the "Poison(4+) ability.

traits.name: War Convoy
traits.desc: Vehicles repair either one Engine Damage or Weapon Damage on themselves during each Rally phase.
